type.description: Campaign type, e.g. ab, multivariate, split, feature-test.

created_at.description: Real API field createdOn: Unix seconds timestamp.

created_by.description: Raw {id, name, imageUrl} object of the campaign's creator, passed through unchanged.

goals.description: Raw {partialCollection, offset, totalCount} goal-summary object, passed through unchanged (see the excluded per-campaign goals detail endpoint in api_surface.json for full goal records).

primary_goal.description: Id of this campaign's primary goal.

variations.description: Raw {partialCollection, totalCount} variation-summary object, passed through unchanged.
